core_payload.content:
# API Gateway

## 1. Role
API Gateway will become one of the hardest sovereignty surfaces in N1Hub. Every provider call, hosted-inference request, webhook callback, connector exchange, and background agent egress will pass through a boundary that is lane-aware, redactable, auditable, and economically governed.

## 2. Future Boundary Contract
- richer route catalogs for model providers, hosted inference, connectors, and callbacks
- actor-bound authentication and authorization at the boundary itself
- lane-aware rate and budget control for interactive, background, and hosted traffic
- stronger observability and artifact lineage for every boundary crossing
- policy hooks for redaction, review, compliance, and trust enforcement

## 3. Operational Consequence
External capability will deepen without becoming opaque because outside power will remain searchable, reviewable, and constrained by explicit policy rather than disappearing into scripts or intuition.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
API Gateway supports To Dig Deep by making openness powerful without weakening control.

neuro_concentrate.summary: API Gateway defines the future hardest sovereignty surface in N1Hub: stricter service contracts, actor-bound auth, lane-aware economics, stronger observability, and reviewable policy hooks around every external boundary crossing.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
